summary: Iteration 5 (Run home Boss CTA centering + meta-row polish + coachmark apostrophe lint fix) verified on mobile 390x844. PRIMARY BUG FIX CONFIRMED: locked boss CTA now renders lock icon on the LEFT and 'COMPLETE 1 SHIFT TO UNLOCK' horizontally centered with textAlign:'center' and the row using justifyContent:'center'. No right-arrow icon in the locked state. Muted background (rgb(37,42,46)) + subtle border distinguishes it from the brand-yellow unlocked state. After flipping runs_completed=1 via PUT /api/player, the CTA correctly switches to unlocked: brand-yellow (rgb(212,175,55)), text 'ENTER THE FADING CORE' centered with right-arrow, and tap navigates to /battle?enemyId=lord_imbalance. Today's Shift encounter meta rows render clean separators: 'AIR · ★1', 'RIVER · ★1', and 'ENERGY · STORM · ★3' — single middle dot between tokens via the new encDot2 separator + gap:6, no double-space sloppiness. Tab regression: all 5 tabs (Run, Heroes, Codex, Kingdom, Profile) navigate cleanly to /, /heroes, /codex, /kingdom, /profile with no errors. Coachmark regression: LongPressCoachmark renders on the first battle (testID coachmark-longpress visible), 'GOT IT — DON'T SHOW AGAIN' label renders with the correct curly apostrophe (lint fix via JS-string expression), and tapping it dismisses the bubble (visible:false after click) and persists via AsyncStorage. No red-screen errors. Console warnings carried over from prior iterations: 'shadow*' style deprecated, props.pointerEvents deprecated, useNativeDriver fallback — all RN-web internals, non-blocking. Backend untouched (per spec) — not retested.

react_native_issues.issue: Carry-over warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. Reference: emitted from RN-web internals; non-blocking.
Carry-over warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Reference: emitted from RN-web internals; non-blocking.

action_items: None blocking. Locked CTA centering bug is fixed and verified on mobile viewport.
critical_code_review_comments: index.tsx bossCta uses flexDirection:'row' + justifyContent:'center' + alignItems:'center' with gap:SPACING.sm. With a left lock icon (14px) the {icon+text} group is centered together inside the row, so the text visually sits a few pixels to the right of dead-center to make room for the icon. This is the standard icon-prefixed-centered-button pattern and matches what the user requested. If a perfectly text-centered-with-icon-floating-left layout is desired, the icon would need to be position:'absolute' left:SPACING.md — but the current solution looks balanced and is not sloppy.
bossCtaLockedText uses flexShrink:1 + adjustsFontSizeToFit + numberOfLines={1}. Good defensive sizing for the locked label across narrow devices.
encMeta now uses gap:6 + dedicated <Text style={styles.encDot2}>·</Text> separators (vs the previous '  ★' literal double-space). Clean and consistent.

LongPressCoachmark.tsx line 71 uses {"GOT IT — DON'T SHOW AGAIN"} as a JS string expression, sidestepping the JSX unescaped-apostrophe lint rule. Curly apostrophe renders correctly in DOM textContent.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on iteration-5 spec: locked-CTA-centered + lock-icon-left + no-arrow, unlocked-CTA-yellow + arrow + nav-to-battle, encounter-meta-dots, tabs-regression (5/5), coachmark-renders + dismiss + apostrophe.

seed_data_creation: Reused TEST_locked_cta player (id 0647bdbe-3da8-423a-850b-07ae3d2c194e, sage aptitude) via POST /api/player. Flipped runs_completed 0→1→0 via PUT /api/player for locked/unlocked toggling. Not auto-cleaned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To test locked vs unlocked Boss CTA: POST /api/player with any aptitude, set localStorage 'clinica.playerId.v1' = player.id, then goto /(tabs). runs_completed=0 → locked CTA (lock icon + 'COMPLETE 1 SHIFT TO UNLOCK'). PUT /api/player {runs_completed:1} → reload → unlocked CTA. Coachmark test: localStorage.removeItem('clinica.coachmark.longpress.v1') before navigating to /battle?enemyId=... — bubble appears, testID 'coachmark-longpress', dismiss via 'GOT IT — DON\u2019T SHOW AGAIN' Pressable or testID 'coachmark-dismiss' on the X icon.
rca_of_issue: Original bug: locked CTA text 'COMPLETE 1 SHIFT TO UNLOCK' was flushed to the left because the bossCta style used flexDirection:'row' with justifyContent:'center' but the inner Text had no textAlign and no flexShrink, so when the text node was wider than the available space (or had a trailing icon), it pushed off-center. FIX VERIFIED: bossCtaLockedText style now includes textAlign:'center' + flexShrink:1, and the locked-state JSX renders only [lock-icon, text] (no right-arrow), so the centered flex row balances the icon+text group correctly. Measured layout: CTA box x=33 w=324 (right=357, center≈195); text box x=99.8 w=212.4 (right=312.2, center≈206) — within visually-centered tolerance given the 14px lock icon + 8px gap on the left side.
